name: Platinum Delight Credit Card

milestones.label: 1,000 bonus reward points on swiping 5 times for ₹1,000+ each in a calendar month

milestoneBenefits: Earn 1,000 bonus reward points on swiping your card 5 times for transactions of ₹1,000 or more in a calendar month
Annual fee waiver on annual spends of ₹2 Lakhs or more
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 4,000 Reward Points (worth ₹1,000) on payment of joining fee and first swipe within 30 days
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at ₹0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).
Excluded spends do not count towards milestone benefits or annual fee waivers.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Weekend spends 2X rate has a cap of 1,000 bonus points per month.
Transaction count milestones and annual fee waivers exclude fuel, utilities, insurance, rent, education, railways, wallet load, and government transactions.
